questions.source_excerpt: CRC32c Standard library module for computing the CRC-32c checksum. CRC32c.crc32c Function crc32c(data, crc::UInt32=0x00000000) Compute the CRC-32c checksum of the given data , which can be an Array{UInt8} , a contiguous subarray thereof, or a String . Optionally, you can pass a starting crc integer
